stemHtml: Pallets with a tare weight of 160 kg are loaded onto two ground supports. The implication of this is that:

options.a: The total weight of the loaded pallets will be increased by 160 kg.
options.b: The ground supports will carry a combined weight of 160 kg.
options.c: The total weight of the loaded pallets will be reduced by 160 kg.
options.d: The ground supports will be unloaded with a tare weight of 160 kg.
